title: URGENT: Manufacturing Lead (cnc/precision/oil&gas)
description:
What you'll be doing

  • Manage and optimize the manufacturing workflows, ensuring production targets are met consistently

  • Oversee the operation of CNC machines and other precision manufacturing equipment to maintain high standards of output

  • Identify and implement process improvements to enhance productivity, reduce waste, and improve cost efficiencies

  • Lead a team of technicians and operators, providing guidance, training, and performance management

  • Collaborate with the engineering and quality assurance teams to resolve issues and enhance product quality

  • Ensure compliance with all relevant health, safety, and environmental regulations

  • Contribute to the development of new manufacturing strategies and capability expansion plans


What we're looking for

  • Diploma / Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related technical discipline

  • Minimum 4 years of hands-on experience in a manufacturing leadership role, preferably in the precision engineering or oil & gas industries

  • Proven track record of driving operational excellence and continuous improvement initiatives

  • Excellent problem-solving and decision-making skills, with the ability to think strategically

  • Strong technical aptitude and understanding of modern manufacturing technologies, including CNC machining and automation

  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills to engage with cross-functional teams

  • Proficient in using data analysis tools to monitor and optimize manufacturing performance


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref68@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg 

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
